name: Urban Tea, Inc.
summary: Urban Tea, Inc. engages in the specialty tea product distribution and retail business in the People's Republic of China. The company offers tea-based beverages, including fresh milk tea, fruit tea, milk cap tea, etc.; light meals comprising salads, sandwiches, pasta, steak, burritos, and other healthy options; and pastries consisting of fresh baked bread, fresh baked cakes, frosting cakes, etc. As of June 30, 2020, it operated through four tea shops, including two flagship and two general stores in the Hunan province, the People's Republic of China. The company is headquartered in Changsha, the People's Republic of China.
